source_discovery_method: extract tenant, site, portal, or requisition API identifiers from configured company URL
list_fetch_method: bounded API request to candidate/search endpoint through source runner
detail_fetch_method: Not required for core fields when the search API returns jobPostingId, title, locations, virtual flag, and posting timestamp.
pagination_method: Search body carries paginationStart; response exposes offset, count, maxCount, and jobPostings[].
canonical_url_rule: Build {boardUrl}/jobs/{jobPostingId} from the discovered culture/clientNamespace/jobBoardCode route.
source_job_id_rule: preserve strongest raw id, requisition id, job id, vacancy id, or stable URL id
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: Saved API fixture covers postingLocations[].isoCountryCode, stateCode, cityName, and formattedAddress evidence.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: Saved API fixture covers postingLocations[].isoCountryCode, stateCode, cityName, and formattedAddress evidence.
remote_type_rule: hasVirtualLocation true maps to remote; structured physical locations with one concrete country map to onsite.
posting_date_rule: Use postingStartTimestampUTC when present; do not infer dates from canonical URL or title.
rate_limit: conservative tenant-level budget, per-host serialization, retry/backoff on 429/5xx

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: no public writes until bounded live canary, source-quality evidence, and recovery guard pass

quarantine_reason: disabled until live canary and source-quality evidence are approved

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: keep disabled until bounded live canary and source-quality evidence are approved
certification_blockers: disabled until live canary and source-quality evidence are approved
